description:
Product information:
Pattern: color matching
Color: 7014 mixed colors, 7014 black Gray, 7014 black red, 7014 dark blue, 7014 sky blue, 7014 light gray, 7014 dark gray, X0630 White, X0630 Black, X0630 light gray, X0630 dark gray, X0630 navy blue
Sock length: short tube
Size: free size
Fabric name: Polyester
Main fabric composition: Polyester Fiber (polyester)
Applicable Gender: Male
Applicable age group: Youth (18-40 years old)
Function: non-slip, sweat-absorbent, anti-friction
Suitable season: Four Seasons Universal
Style: Sports

Note: 1. Asian sizes are 1 to 2 sizes smaller than European and American people. Choose the larger size if your size between two sizes. Please allow 2-3cm differences due to manual measurement. 2. Please check the size chart carefully before you buy the item, if you don't know how to choose size, please contact our customer service. 3.As you know, the different computers display colors differently, the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the following images.
Packing list:
Socks*10pair/*20pair
